attributes.dangerouslySetInnerHTML: @layer base{:root{--background: 0 0% 100%;--foreground: 24 9.8% 10%;--muted: 60 4.8% 95.9%;--muted-foreground: 25 5.3% 44.7%;--popover: 0 0% 100%;--popover-foreground: 24 9.8% 10%;--card: 0 0% 100%;--card-foreground: 24 9.8% 10%;--border: 20 5.9% 90%;--input: 20 5.9% 90%;--primary: 15.3 74.6% 27.8%;--primary-foreground: 0 0% 100%;--secondary: 24 9.8% 10%;--secondary-foreground: 0 0% 100%;--accent: 60 4.8% 95.9%;--accent-foreground: 24 9.8% 10%;--alert: 0 84.2% 60.2%;--alert-foreground: 60 9.1% 97.8%;--ring: 24 9.8% 10%;--border-width: 0px;--border-radius: 1rem;--shadow-base: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .01);--shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .05);--shadow: 0 1px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 1px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-2xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1);--shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .01);--transform-press: scale(.95)}.dark{--background: 20 14.3% 4.1%;--foreground: 60 9.1% 97.8%;--muted: 12 6.5% 15.1%;--muted-foreground: 24 5.4% 63.9%;--popover: 20 14.3% 4.1%;--popover-foreground: 60 9.1% 97.8%;--card: 20 14.3% 4.1%;--card-foreground: 60 9.1% 97.8%;--border: 12 6.5% 15.1%;--input: 12 6.5% 15.1%;--primary: 15.3 74.6% 27.8%;--primary-foreground: 0 0% 100%;--secondary: 60 4.8% 95.9%;--secondary-foreground: 0 0% 0%;--accent: 12 6.5% 15.1%;--accent-foreground: 60 9.1% 97.8%;--alert: 0 84.2% 60.2%;--alert-foreground: 0 0% 98%;--ring: 24 5.7% 82.9%;--border-width: 0px;--border-radius: 1rem;--shadow-base: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .01);--shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .05);--shadow: 0 1px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 1px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);--shadow-2xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1);--shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .01);--transform-press: scale(.95)}}:root{font-family:system-ui,Avenir,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;line-height:1.5;font-weight:400;color-scheme:light dark;color:#ffffffde;background-color:#242424;font-synthesis:none;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale}a{font-weight:500;color:#646cff;text-decoration:inherit}a:hover{color:#535bf2}body{margin:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;place-items:center;min-width:320px;min-height:100vh}h1{font-size:3.2em;line-height:1.1}button{border-radius:8px;border:1px solid transparent;padding:.6em 1.2em;font-size:1em;font-weight:500;font-family:inherit;background-color:#1a1a1a;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .25s}button:hover{border-color:#646cff}button:focus,button:focus-visible{outline:4px auto -webkit-focus-ring-color}@media (prefers-color-scheme: light){:root{color:#213547;background-color:#fff}a:hover{color:#747bff}button{background-color:#f9f9f9}}

.game-root{display:flex;height:100vh;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;background:transparent}.scene-area{flex:1;position:relative;background:transparent;overflow:hidden}.scene-canvas{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}.overlay{pointer-events:none}.scene-error{position:absolute;left:16px;bottom:16px;background:#7f1d1de6;color:#fecaca;border:1px solid #991b1b;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;max-width:380px}.test-mode-badge{position:absolute;left:16px;top:16px;background:#b4780ae6;color:#fff7d6;border:1px solid #92400e;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;max-width:420px}.set-aside-strip{position:absolute;top:16px;left:16px;padding:12px 20px;background:#2b170780;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:12px;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 16px #0006}.set-aside-label{font-size:10px;color:#fed7aa;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.set-aside-die{text-align:center}.set-aside-die-icon{font-size:26px;opacity:.6;color:#fff;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5))}.set-aside-die-pts{font-size:10px;color:#4ade80;margin-top:2px;font-weight:700}.farkle-banner{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:#501414d9;border:2px solid rgba(239,68,68,.6);border-radius:16px;padding:24px 40px;text-align:center;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);box-shadow:0 8px 32px #0009;animation:banner-pop .4s cubic-bezier(.175,.885,.32,1.275)}.farkle-title{font-size:28px;color:#fca5a5;font-weight:800;text-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.farkle-sub{font-size:14px;color:#fecaca;margin-top:8px;font-weight:500}@keyframes banner-pop{0%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.85)}to{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)}}.panel{width:260px;background:#2b170780;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;color:#fef3c7;border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);box-shadow:-4px 0 24px #0006}.top-bar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:4px}.panel-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin:0;color:#d4d4d8;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.btn-new-game{background:#ffffff1a;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}.btn-new-game:hover{background:#fff3}.score-card{background:#0000004d;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);box-shadow:inset 0 2px 4px #0003}.score-label{font-size:10px;color:#a1a1aa;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px}.score-turn{font-size:32px;font-weight:800;color:#fbbf24;line-height:1.1;text-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.score-divider{height:1px;background:#ffffff1a;margin:14px 0}.score-total{font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#4ade80;line-height:1.1;text-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.score-target-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}.score-target-label{font-size:10px;color:#a1a1aa;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600}.score-target-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#d4d4d8}.progress-track{height:6px;background:#00000080;border-radius:3px;margin-top:8px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)}.progress-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#10b981);border-radius:3px;transition:width .4s ease-out;box-shadow:0 0 8px #22c55e80}.selection-card{background:#0000004d;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;flex:1;min-height:80px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);box-shadow:inset 0 2px 4px #0003}.selection-label{font-size:10px;color:#a1a1aa;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px}.selection-empty{font-size:13px;color:#71717a;text-align:center;padding:10px 0;font-style:italic}.combo-chip{background:#ffffff14;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;color:#e0f2fe;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)}.combo-pts{color:#fbbf24;font-weight:700}.selection-total-row{margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px}.selection-total-label{color:#a1a1aa;font-weight:600}.selection-total-value{color:#fbbf24;font-weight:800}.selection-warning{font-size:11px;color:#f87171;margin-top:8px;text-align:center;font-weight:600}.btn-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;margin-top:8px}.btn{width:100%;padding:14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s ease;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.4);box-shadow:0 4px 12px #0000004d}.btn:active:not(.btn-disabled){transform:scale(.96)}.btn-disabled{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.4;box-shadow:none;border-color:transparent}.btn-roll{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#d97706,#b45309);color:#fff;border-color:#f59e0b}.btn-roll:hover:not(.btn-disabled){background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#f59e0b,#d97706)}.btn-roll.btn-disabled{background:#0006;color:#71717a}.btn-bank{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#16a34a,#047857);color:#fff;border-color:#34d399}.btn-bank:hover:not(.btn-disabled){background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#22c55e,#059669)}.btn-bank.btn-disabled{background:#0006;color:#71717a}.btn-farkle{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#b91c1c,#7f1d1d);color:#fecaca;border-color:#dc2626}.btn-farkle:hover{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#dc2626,#991b1b)}.kbd-hint{display:inline-block;background:#ffffff26;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:11px;margin-left:6px;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;font-weight:600;vertical-align:middle;line-height:1.4}
